response.processed:
MenuButton: ver-center, gap $sm-gap, pad $sm-pad $lg-pad, bg $surface-bg, col $default-col, rad $md-rad, cursor pointer

Menu: gap $sm-gap, pad $md-pad, bg $elevated-bg, rad $md-rad
  state hidden

Col gap $md-gap
  MenuButton "Open Menu"
  Menu named MainMenu
    - Item "Dashboard"
    - Item "Profile"
    - Item "Settings"
